arts.ttl: Jota dances through Everton defence to put Liverpool ahead!
arts.sum: Diogo Jota gives Liverpool the derby day lead over Everton.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes angry accusation in VAR verdict on Liverpool vs Everton red card drama
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher gave a scathing assessment of Samuel Barrot and VAR after seeing Everton defender James Tarkowski escape a red card in the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Premier League admit James Tarkowski's tackle on Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister was 'reckless' but decide to not send off Everton captain after VAR check
arts.sum: James Tarkowski proved the scourge of Liverpool again as Everton defender escaped red for brutal challenge on Alexis Mac Allister. He scored a late equaliser in the last Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Wood, Gakpo + more: FPL price change predictions for April 3
arts.sum: LiveFPL's daily price change predictions The post Wood, Gakpo + more: FPL price change predictions for April 3 appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes furious Liverpool vs Everton James Tarkowski red card point - 'trust me'
arts.sum: Gary Neville has given his opinion on James Tarkowski's tackle on Alexis Mac Allister during the Merseyside derby between Liverpool and Everton

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive new red card referee verdict as James Tarkowski controversy takes twist
arts.sum: Everton captain James Tarkowski was given a yellow card for a challenge on Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister in the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Mike Dean launches furious VAR rant as he slams Liverpool vs Everton red card controversy
arts.sum: James Tarkowski went flying in on Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister during the opening stages of Everton's match with their Merseyside rivals - but he somehow escaped a red card

arts.ttl: Everton legend Duncan Ferguson reveals how much he spent on his Toffees tattoo - and jokes 'it doesn't look like that now!'
arts.sum: Former Everton striker Duncan Ferguson has revealed how much he spent on his iconic Toffees tattoo ahead of Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Premier League statement labels James Tarkowski tackle 'reckless' after Everton man avoids red card
arts.sum: James Tarkowski avoided a red card for a high tackle on Alexis Mac Allister during the Merseyside derby between Liverpool and Everton at Anfield

arts.ttl: Premier League offer explanation on VAR red card controversy in Liverpool vs Everton
arts.sum: Everton defender James Tarkowski was left sweating during the early stages of the Merseyside derby after his heavy challenge on Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister was reviewed by VAR
